title: androsace vitaliana var. nevadensis
intro: Androsace vitaliana var. nevadensis, also known as the Sierra starflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Primulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Androsace vitaliana var. nevadensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
